title: thelypteris filix-femina
intro: Thelypteris filix-femina, also known as the lady fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris filix-femina include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Thelypteris filix-femina can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be cautioned due to potential interactions with other medications.
